SBA Lender Introduction
ESOP Transaction — Preliminary Indication Request

Reference

§ 01Introduction

Dear {{lenderContact}},

Forhemit Stewardship Management Co. is facilitating an employee ownership transition for {{companyName}} and is seeking a preliminary SBA 7(a) lending indication. This letter summarizes the deal and requests your initial assessment of financing viability.

Forhemit is the transaction steward — we coordinate the deal team, prepare lender packages, and manage the process timeline. We are not the borrower, the buyer, or the seller's agent. The operating company is the borrower.

§ 02Deal Summary
Transaction Overview
{{companyName}}
{{industry}}
{{location}}
{{entityType}}
{{employeeCount}}
{{foundedYear}}
Financial Summary (QofE-Normalized)
{{revenueTTM}}
{{ebitdaTTM}}
{{valuation}}
{{valuationMultiple}}
Capital Stack (Proposed)
{{sbaAmount}}
{{sellerNoteAmount}}
{{totalConsideration}}
{{day1Cash}}
{{downPayment}}
§ 03SBA Eligibility Factors

Key factors for SBA 7(a) eligibility assessment:

A.ESOP structure. 100% equity acquisition by ESOP trust. Operating company is the borrower. ESOP trust is the buyer.
B.Entity conversion. {{#if requiresConversion}}{{entityType}} converting to C-Corp prior to close. Tax election filed.{{else}}Already a C-Corp. No conversion required.{{/if}}
C.Forhemit independence. Forhemit holds no equity, no board seat, no voting rights, no managerial control. All fees paid by operating company as business expenses.
D.Debt service coverage. Pro forma DSCR of {{dscr}} based on QofE-normalized EBITDA and proposed debt terms.
E.Management continuity. {{#if managementContinuity}}Existing management team retained post-close. Key person: {{keyPerson}}.{{else}}Management transition plan in place.{{/if}}
§ 04What We're Requesting

We are seeking a preliminary indication on the following:

1.Interest. Is this a deal your institution would consider financing?
2.Indicative terms. What are the indicative interest rate, term, and amortization for a deal of this size and structure?
3.Timeline. What is your typical underwriting timeline from application to commitment letter?
4.Requirements. What additional information do you need to move from preliminary indication to formal application?
Note: This is a preliminary inquiry, not a formal loan application. We are evaluating multiple lenders and will select based on terms, timeline, and ESOP experience. A full lender package will follow if you express interest.
§ 05Enclosed Documents

The following documents are enclosed with this introduction:

A.Executive summary. One-page deal overview with financial highlights.
B.Capital stack summary. Sources and uses breakdown.
C.Debt service model. Pro forma DSCR under multiple scenarios.
D.Company overview. Industry, history, operations, and competitive position.
§ 06Contact

For questions or to express interest, please contact:

deals@forhemit.com
{{ref}}

Please reference the above number in all correspondence related to this transaction.

—Forhemit Transition Stewardship
Forhemit Stewardship Management Co.
California Public Benefit Corporation
Authorized Representative

This introduction does not constitute a loan application or commitment.
